text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Opera O! I thought of a cool one-liner! 
Couldja give it a listen for me?!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
I spent all night thinking it up, 
so I'm sure it's a masterpiece!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Haaa-ha-ha-ha-ha! All right, show me 
the depth of your abyss!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
I am the Ultimate Supernova of 
the Racecourse! Pull my trigger 
and watch me fly… Bam!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
I could feel the radical nature of your 
nightmare. The rich vibrations of your 
supernova echoed endlessly into the night!

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text: Ohhh… How'd you make it even cooler?!
